entries.label: Transfer Hook
entries.summary: Route every mint transfer through a custom program that can veto or annotate the movement.

sdkSupport.remediationHint: Upgrade to 0.15.35+ or eject to the @wallet-standard/react scaffold — older wallet-adapter versions silently drop the transfer_hook extra accounts and produce invalid transactions.
Transfers render as 'unverified' in Phantom < 24.25; upgrade or disable transfer_hook for Phantom users.

entries.label: Transfer Fee
entries.summary: Automatically withholds a basis-point fee on every transfer, claimable by a withdraw authority.

entries.label: Metadata Pointer
entries.summary: Stores a pubkey on the mint that points to the metadata account (mpl-token-metadata or an on-mint metadata extension).

entries.label: Token Metadata (on-mint)
entries.summary: Stores name/symbol/uri directly on the Token-2022 mint via the MetadataPointer pointing to itself.

sdkSupport.remediationHint: mpl-token-metadata < 3.3 reads legacy Metadata PDAs first; point explicitly at the mint when fetching so the on-mint metadata is surfaced.

entries.label: Interest Bearing
entries.summary: Mints accrue interest that grows the displayed balance without moving lamports.

sdkSupport.remediationHint: Balance display omits accrued interest on wallet-adapter < 0.15.35 — users will see stale token amounts.

entries.label: Non-Transferable
entries.summary: Marks a mint as soulbound — once minted, tokens cannot be moved between wallets.

entries.label: Permanent Delegate
entries.summary: Gives a single authority unconditional authority to transfer or burn any mint balance.

sdkSupport.remediationHint: Phantom surfaces the permanent-delegate as a 'centralized' warning but still signs; decide whether to gate your mint with a trust page before enabling.

entries.label: Default Account State
entries.summary: New token accounts default to Frozen, requiring an unfreeze before use.

entries.label: Mint Close Authority
entries.summary: Allows the authority to close the mint account once supply reaches zero, reclaiming rent.

entries.label: Confidential Transfer
entries.summary: Zero-knowledge encrypted balances via the confidential-transfer extension.

sdkSupport.remediationHint: Confidential transfer requires manual ElGamal key setup; use @solana/spl-token confidential-transfer helpers and plan for per-user key rotation.
No wallet-adapter version decrypts confidential balances; users must use a custom client built on @solana/spl-token's ZK helpers.
Phantom does not yet sign confidential-transfer instructions; ship with a fallback UX until wallet support lands.

entries.label: Required Memo Transfer
entries.summary: Token accounts can require that every incoming transfer include a memo instruction.

entries.label: CPI Guard
entries.summary: Prevents specific token instructions from being invoked via CPI without explicit owner approval.

entries.label: Immutable Owner
entries.summary: Locks the token account's owner so it cannot be reassigned once set.

entries.label: Group Pointer
entries.summary: Pointer to the on-mint group extension for collection-like grouping.

sdkSupport.remediationHint: Metaplex's collection semantics predate Token-2022 groups; double-publish a Metaplex collection + a Group Pointer until clients catch up.

entries.label: Group Member Pointer
entries.summary: Pointer from a member mint back to the group mint.

entries.label: Scaled UI Amount
entries.summary: Display raw amounts multiplied by a live scale — useful for rebasing or inflation-adjusted tokens.

sdkSupport.remediationHint: Balances render pre-scale on wallet-adapter < 0.15.40 — upgrade or render the scaled amount client-side with spl-token utilities.
